rules.must: resolve the current HEAD and search planned declaration names
prefer a thin composition theorem before a new structure
rules.because: it removes a real adapter layer with minimal risk

rules.when: a theorem assumes geometric or marginal scale behavior
rules.must: encode the branch in the theorem name
rules.because: the 4D marginal coupling is not geometrically decaying

rules.when: an adapter reaches SingleScaleUVDecay or M3
rules.because: raw source estimates and the physical remainder identity remain hypotheses

rules.when: a lattice decay theorem is obtained
rules.must_not: claim continuum mass gap or Clay

rules.because: collapsing supports can create false factorization

rules.must: label the statement source-anchor, candidate, theorem-shape or Lean-verified
rules.because: source provenance is not formal verification

rules.must: state the exact quantifier order and allowed constant dependencies
rules.because: pointwise finite-volume estimates do not imply a uniform theorem

rules.must: state the exact correlator expression and constants
rules.because: a positive gap witness alone can be vacuous or misidentified

rules.must: include isolated Lean, core, oracle, consistency and diff commands
rules.because: the repo's standard of evidence is machine-checked

forbidden_phrases_without_proof: CMP116 proves the Lean support inclusion exactly
